item.title: Simplifying Your React Forms with the Magic of useState
item.description: When working with forms in React, each input field needs its own state and handler, right? Well, what if I told you there’s a way to manage all your input fields with just one state and one handler? That’s right, it’s time to streamline your forms with the magic of the useState hook. The Typical Way: One State Per Input In the usual approach, every input field in a React form gets its own state:
